CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Continued To Jan-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-29-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:

Lawrence R. Sussman, Esq., for Mark Walls, Karen Birmingham, Plaintiff/Moving Party

HEARING HELD. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. The application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is ordered off calendar unless plaintiff submits a valid proof of service. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Ntc Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance; And Writ Attachment
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Mark Walls' Application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is ordered off calendar as there is no proof of service of the motion. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Exparte Application For Order And Ntc Of Hearing To Modify Of Or Vacate Temporary Protective Order
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Enterprise West Properties' ex parte application for order to modify or vacate temporary protective order is granted as both parties agree to the modification. COMM. BRUCE CHAN
